evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Design and build high-quality, scalable dashboards, semantic models, and analytical features
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Agile sprint-delivery velocity language is balanced against quality/documentation rigour signals, giving parity.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Manufacturing/supply chain operational analytics affecting business decisions, but no financial reporting, regulatory, or compliance language present.
evidence.data_team_maturity: embedding within Supply Chain product squads (Packaging, Brewing, or Utilities) as a senior expert
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A named D&A Product Organisation with multiple distinct product squads and established Agile ways of working indicates a mature, specialised function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Advanced BI development expertise (Power BI, Grafana) including semantic modelling, DAX, Power Query
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise tool and technique names (Power BI, Grafana, DAX, Power Query, Azure ADF/Synapse/Databricks) give a concrete picture of the daily work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role is embedded in a Product Organisation working in product squads with backlog and sprint delivery, giving it a product-oriented framing even though the domain is industrial/supply chain.
evidence.autonomy_level: Provide senior level guidance throughout sprints
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Senior technical leadership and guidance are paired with execution embedded within squads delivering against defined use cases, giving mixed autonomy.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool or AI infrastructure mention appears anywhere in the extracted JD text.
evidence.testing_framing: Break down complex (analytical) requirements into clear, testable backlog items
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: The only testing-adjacent language refers to Agile backlog item testability, not data quality, testing frameworks, or data contracts, so testing_framing is absent.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed in delivery, product, and capability terms with no risk register or compliance framing.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Contribute to the refinement of global, reusable use cases
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role mixes new analytical product/dashboard design with refining and scaling existing global use cases.
